description: High-level canonical state areas for the faithful turn-based Dark Future adaptation.

stateAreas.description: Current turn, phase, activation order, and pending phase/turn transitions.
Track pieces, track spaces, lane links, facings, contact zones, deployed hazards, and generated road state.
Vehicle instances, current position, speed, control state, damage, mounted equipment, and tactical status.
Driver identity, role, skill, injuries, progression, mental/medical/campaign status, and unit membership.
Mounted weapons, ammo, passive systems, firing state, and weapon damage.
Scenario setup, victory conditions, deployment zones, and scenario-specific rules.
Units, agency/gang state, funds, contracts, post-engagement sequence, kudos, recruitment, repairs, and persistent progression.
Explicit choices required from a player, AI, or campaign controller before resolution can continue.
Structured, source-referenced rule events and dice results.
